'''Yang Wood Horse''' is the 31st of the sixty nodes of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Divine Sixty]], the great cycle that the [[Heavenly stems|heavenly stems]] and [[Earthly Branches|earthly branches]] trace across the ringworld's calendar of [[Gaia]] and [[Luna]].

Its stem is 甲 Kinoe (yang wood, the gaia-aligned face of spring), and its branch is 午 Uma, the [[Horse (zodiac)|Horse]] hour. Within the [[Wuxing]] reading of the node, the stem's wood generates the branch's fire, a relationship of nourishment.

On the [[The divine 60|Divine Sixty]] lattice this position falls between [[Yin Water Snake]] (node 30) and [[Yin Wood Goat]] (node 32).

== Stem and branch ==
* '''Stem:''' [[Kinoe (甲)]] — yang wood
* '''Branch:''' [[Horse (zodiac)|Horse (午)]] — yang fire
* '''Celestial body:''' [[Gaia]]
* '''Element-season:''' spring

== See also ==
* [[The divine 60]]
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]
* [[Yin Water Snake]] — preceding node
* [[Yin Wood Goat]] — following node

{{wikidata link|Q904930}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Ringworld]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
